allow: PowerShell($tools = @\('code','git','choco','chrome'\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$t : FOUND \($\($c.Source\)\)" } else { "$t : not found" } }; "---"; "Chrome check:"; if \(Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe'\) { "Chrome installed" } else { "Chrome not in default path" })

PowerShell("flutter.bat at C:\\flutter\\bin: $\(Test-Path 'C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat'\)"; "dart.bat present: $\(Test-Path 'C:\\flutter\\bin\\dart.bat'\)"; "---"; "Top of C:\\flutter:"; if \(Test-Path 'C:\\flutter'\) { Get-ChildItem 'C:\\flutter' | Select-Object -First 15 Name | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { "C:\\flutter missing" })

PowerShell(Start-Process "ms-settings:developers"; "Opened Developer settings. Also checking current state..."; $key='HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\AppModelUnlock'; if \(Test-Path $key\) { $v=\(Get-ItemProperty $key -Name AllowDevelopmentWithoutDevLicense -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).AllowDevelopmentWithoutDevLicense; "Developer Mode currently: $\(if\($v -eq 1\){'ON'}else{'OFF'}\)" } else { "Developer Mode: OFF \(key not set\)" })
